---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks, refactoring, or technical debt
title: 'Maintenance: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Type of Maintenance
- [ ] Code Refactoring
- [ ] Dependency Updates
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Technical Debt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Current State
Describe the current state of the code/system that needs maintenance.

## Desired State
Describe what the code/system should look like after maintenance.

## Impact
Describe the impact of this maintenance task:
- **User Impact**: [Low/Medium/High]
- **Developer Impact**: [Low/Medium/High]
- **System Performance Impact**: [Low/Medium/High]

## Priority Justification
Explain why this maintenance task should be prioritized.

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-16 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 16 hours)

## Dependencies
List any dependencies or blockers for this maintenance task.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, code snippets, or technical details here.
